## James Drayton Beninger

[View All Credentials](https://www.credential.net/profile/jamesdraytonbeninger432327/wallet)

The recipient of this credential has completed "Foundations of Humane Technology," an online course focused on building technology which:

\- Respects Human Nature
\- Minimizes Harmful Consequences
\- Centers Values
\- Creates Shared Understanding
\- Supports Fairness and Justice
\- Helps People Thrive

A graduate of this course is prepared to bring a sophisticated perspective on humane technology to the product development process.

### Skills / Knowledge

- Humane Product Development


### Issued on

April 16, 2023

### Expires on

Does not expire
